finding.root_cause_summary: The pom.xml explicitly pins `<hibernate.version>5.3.1.Final</hibernate.version>` (line 35), which is a Spring Boot managed property that overrides the Hibernate version brought in by `spring-boot-starter-data-jpa`. After the `upgrade_spring_boot_3_3` recipe upgrades the parent to Spring Boot 3.3, this override forces Hibernate 5.3.1.Final — a version that is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Hibernate 6.4+) and unavailable in the nexus repository, causing the dependency resolution failure.
finding.fix_hint: Remove the `<hibernate.version>5.3.1.Final</hibernate.version>` property from pom.xml so Spring Boot 3.3's managed Hibernate 6.x version takes effect.
